name: Hugging Face
description: Search models, datasets, Spaces, and run Gradio apps from the Hugging Face Hub
longDescription: Official Hugging Face MCP server connecting AI assistants to the Hugging Face Hub. Search and explore models, datasets, Spaces, papers, and documentation. Run and manage Gradio Spaces as tools. Configure tools and Spaces at https://huggingface.co/settings/mcp
author: Hugging Face

apiKeyConfig.label: Hugging Face User Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens with read/write scope

examplePrompts: Find the best LLM for code generation
Get details for the Llama-3-8B model
Search Hugging Face docs for transformers pipelines
